Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

C. Mark Humbert, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Patricia Ann Wilson, dba Highiet Appraisers.
Ms. Wilson was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Erik Bedford.
Default was entered against defendant on December 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 13, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Patricia Ann Wilson, dba Highiet & Appraisers as follows:

Damages/Principal - $55,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,059.45.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $61,474.45.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
